titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Basketball
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Basketball
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 7, 2020 at 11:04

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, records documenting basketball
did.abstract: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, scorecards, and reports documenting basketball at Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-B (YRG 38-B), Records documenting specific sports at Yale.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: Basketball scrapbooks are available on microfilm from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no HM179. 1984-1985. 2348 frames on 4 reels, 35mm.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Department of Athletics, 2005.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are partially restricted. See inventory for details. Scrapbooks for the years 1915-1951 are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM 179 instead of the originals.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Scrapbooks for the years 1915-1951 are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM FILM 179 instead of the originals.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Basketball (RU 947). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, scorecards, and reports documenting basketball at Yale.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scrapbooks in boxes 1-4 and 6 are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM FILM 179 instead of the originals.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 179 instead of the originals

accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 179 instead of the originals
